title: Gowtham Groups Corporate Website Frontend Implementation

requirements.summary: Create hero section with company branding, tagline, and call-to-action button
acceptanceCriteria: Hero section displays company name 'Gowtham Groups'
Includes tagline or mission statement
Contains prominent CTA button
Uses full-width layout with background image or color

file_operations.description: Create Hero component with company branding 'Gowtham Groups', tagline, CTA button, and full-width layout. Use the generated hero background image at frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png and company logo at frontend/public/assets/generated/gowtham-logo.dim_400x200.png as static assets.
Import and render Hero component at the top of the main page layout

requirements.summary: Implement About Us section with company overview, mission, vision, and core values
acceptanceCriteria: Section includes company description
Displays mission and vision statements
Lists core values or company principles
Uses professional layout with proper spacing

file_operations.description: Create About component displaying Gowtham Groups company description, mission and vision statements, and core values. Use professional layout with proper spacing and incorporate the generated background image at frontend/public/assets/generated/about-bg.dim_1200x800.png as a section background.
Import and render About component after the Hero section

requirements.summary: Create Services/Products section with cards showcasing business offerings
acceptanceCriteria: Displays multiple service/product categories
Each category has icon or image, title, and brief description
Uses grid or card-based layout
Responsive design for mobile and desktop

file_operations.description: Create Services component with grid/card layout showcasing Gowtham Groups business offerings. Use generated service icons: frontend/public/assets/generated/service-manufacturing.dim_256x256.png for manufacturing operations, frontend/public/assets/generated/service-logistics.dim_256x256.png for logistics/distribution, and frontend/public/assets/generated/service-retail.dim_256x256.png for retail/merchandising. Implement responsive grid layout.
Import and render Services component after the About section

requirements.summary: Build Contact section with company information and inquiry submission form
acceptanceCriteria: Displays company contact details (address, phone, email)
Includes working contact form with name, email, subject, and message fields
Form validates required fields before submission
User receives confirmation after successful submission

file_operations.description: Create Contact component with two sections: company contact information display (fetched from backend via getContactInfo) and inquiry form with name, email, and message fields. Implement form validation, call submitInquiry backend function on submission, and show success/error feedback to user.
Create React Query hook to fetch contact information from backend using getContactInfo method
Create React Query mutation hook to submit inquiry form data using submitInquiry backend method
Import and render Contact component after the Services section

requirements.summary: Create responsive navigation header with logo and section menu
acceptanceCriteria: Navigation bar is fixed or sticky at top
Includes Gowtham Groups logo/branding
Menu items navigate to corresponding sections
Mobile-responsive with hamburger menu on small screens
Active section is highlighted in navigation

file_operations.description: Create Header component with sticky/fixed navigation bar, Gowtham Groups logo (using frontend/public/assets/generated/gowtham-logo.dim_400x200.png), menu items for Home, About, Services, and Contact sections with smooth scroll navigation, mobile hamburger menu, and active section highlighting
Import and render Header component at the top of the application, before all other sections

requirements.summary: Implement footer with company information, quick links, social media, and copyright
acceptanceCriteria: Footer contains company tagline or brief description
Includes quick links to main sections
Displays social media icons (LinkedIn, Facebook, Twitter, etc.)
Shows copyright notice with current year
Uses professional multi-column layout

file_operations.description: Create Footer component with multi-column layout containing company tagline/description, quick links to main sections (Home, About, Services, Contact), social media icons for LinkedIn, Facebook, Twitter, and copyright notice with dynamic current year
Import and render Footer component at the bottom of the application, after all other sections

requirements.summary: Design professional corporate visual theme with sophisticated styling and modern layout
acceptanceCriteria: Uses professional color scheme (avoid blue and purple unless specifically corporate brand colors)
Typography is clean and readable with proper hierarchy
Layout follows modern corporate design patterns
Consistent spacing and visual rhythm throughout
Design conveys trust, professionalism, and stability

file_operations.description: Update global styles with professional corporate color palette (using warm neutrals, sophisticated grays, and accent colors that avoid blue/purple), establish typography hierarchy with clean readable fonts, and set consistent spacing variables
Extend Tailwind configuration with custom corporate color palette, typography scale for professional hierarchy, and spacing utilities to support consistent visual rhythm throughout the application
